---
title: "Julia for Empirical Economics"
subtitle: "Kosuke Shimamoto, Duke University"
---

::: {.course-hero}
::: {.logo-row}
::: {.logo-tile .duke-tile}
![](assets/img/duke-wordmark-white.svg){fig-alt="Duke University wordmark"}
:::

::: {.logo-tile .julia-tile}
![](assets/img/julia-logo.svg){fig-alt="Julia programming language logo"}
:::
:::

This module offers the opportunity to learn Julia programming and practical skills for economics research, especially computationally intensive work such as structural estimation.
:::


- Time
  - July 20 - August 6, 2026
  - Mon, Tue, and Thu, 12:30pm - 2:55pm
- Location: Social Sciences 105
- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/kosukeshimamoto/julia-empirical-economics)

## Lecture Schedule

{{< include _schedule.qmd >}}

## Assignments

- [HW1](/assignments/weekly-assignment/weekly-assignment1.qmd): Jul 26, 23:59
- HW2: Aug 2, 23:59
- HW3: Aug 9, 23:59

## Final Project

- TBA
